prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_1: large brown rubber cube
  - obj_2: small brown metal cube
  - obj_3: small yellow metal sphere
  - obj_4: small gray metal cylinder
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_7: large red rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_9: large gray rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0081] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0082] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0083] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0084] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0085] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0086] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0087] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0088] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0089] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0090] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0091] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0092] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0093] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0094] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0095] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0096] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0097] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0098] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0099] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0100] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in the scene.

Looking at the image, I need to identify the positions of the objects:
- obj_0: large yellow metal sphere (back-left area, elevated)
- obj_1: large brown rubber cube (center)
- obj_2: small brown metal cube (front-left)
- obj_3: small yellow metal sphere (front-center)
- obj_4: small gray metal cylinder (front-left area)
- obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder (center-front)
- obj_6: large yellow metal sphere (back-right, elevated)
- obj_7: large red rubber sphere (back area)
- obj_8: small cyan metal cube (right area)
- obj_9: large gray rubber cube (right)

Distance between obj_0 and obj_4: obj_0 is back-left elevated, obj_4 is front-left. Moderate distance.

Now comparing to each pair:

- obj_1 to obj_2: brown cube to small brown metal cube - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_3: brown cube to small yellow sphere - moderate distance  
- obj_1 to obj_5: brown cube to yellow cylinder - small distance
- obj_1 to obj_7: brown cube to red sphere - large distance
- obj_1 to obj_8: brown cube to cyan cube - moderate distance
- obj_1 to obj_9: brown cube to gray cube - moderate distance
- obj_2 to obj_3: small brown to small yellow - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_5: small brown to yellow cylinder - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_7: small brown to red sphere - large
- obj_2 to obj_8: small brown to cyan - moderate-large
- obj_2 to obj_9: small brown to gray cube - moderate
- obj_3 to obj_5: small yellow to yellow cylinder - small
- obj_3 to obj_6: small yellow to large yellow (back) - large
- obj_3 to obj_7: small yellow to red sphere - large
- obj_3 to obj_9: small yellow to gray cube - moderate
- obj_5 to obj_6: yellow cylinder to large yellow - large
- obj_5 to obj_7: yellow cylinder to red sphere - large
- obj_5 to obj_8: yellow cylinder to cyan cube - moderate
- obj_6 to obj_7: large yellow to red sphere - small-moderate
- obj_6 to obj_8: large yellow to cyan cube - moderate

Estimating obj_0 to obj_4 distance: roughly moderate-large.
